stock.label: About Primary Stock Asset
stock.notes: Canonical stock placeholder for the About section primary facade image role.

candidates.label: Nano About Primary Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage about section primary image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage About section primary architectural image",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic building image that signals established engineering capability, modern systems thinking, and premium B2B credibility",
  "visual_message": "A clean high-tech facility exterior that feels contemporary, structured, and trustworthy rather than like a generic downtown postcard",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "industrial-realism-anchors",
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "named-visual-standard",
    "color-material-control"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the tall facade rhythm and strong vertical silhouette",
    "image_2": "optional facade detail and material realism reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "50mm architectural exterior photography",
    "aperture": "f/5",
    "light_source": "controlled daylight with clean reflective glass behavior",
    "time_of_day": "late morning neutral daylight",
    "motion_rule": "static architectural shot with no moving traffic emphasis"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "dominant facade mass fills most of the frame",
    "street-level clutter remains secondary and cropped low",
    "vertical lines stay legible in a tall web frame",
    "adjacent structures can support scale without becoming the subject"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium architectural exterior photography for a corporate technology brand",
  "color_restriction": "restrained cool neutrals, reflective glass blues, steel greys, and concrete tones only; avoid saturated skies and postcard colors",
  "material_notes": [
    "glass curtain wall",
    "clean metal framing",
    "precise facade joints",
    "realistic reflections without over-polish"
  ],
  "scene": "A modern engineering facility or high-tech office tower exterior with clean glazing, disciplined facade rhythm, and a premium contemporary character",
  "subject": "The facade itself is the hero, not people, traffic, or signage",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible modern facade geometry",
    "high-tech exterior character",
    "clean glazing and structural rhythm",
    "minimal urban clutter"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "4:5",
    "hero_safe_area": "not required",
    "focal_structure": "one dominant facade mass with one supporting reflection rhythm",
    "camera": "architectural exterior photography, eye-level or slightly upward",
    "cropping": "designed for the tall about-section media frame"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial architectural photography",
    "mood": "confident, precise, established",
    "contrast": "controlled and realistic",
    "surface_behavior": "clean highlights and believable reflective glass response"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a modern industrial B2B website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must avoid postcard tourism energy",
    "must not contain readable signage or UI",
    "must look like part of the same visual system as the hero image"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "generic skyline composition",
    "heavy traffic dominating the frame",
    "crowds or pedestrians as a focal point",
    "futuristic holograms",
    "headline text or embedded graphics",
    "oversaturated sky",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Pro baseline round 1 for homepage-wide compare, calibrated v2 prompt

candidates.label: Nano About Primary Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage about section primary image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage About section primary architectural image",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic engineering facility image that signals industrial integration capability, modern systems thinking, and premium B2B credibility",
  "visual_message": "A clean high-tech industrial or engineering facility exterior that feels contemporary, structured, and trustworthy. It should look like a place where engineering integration happens, not just a generic office tower.",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "industrial-realism-anchors",
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "named-visual-standard",
    "color-material-control"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the tall facade rhythm and strong vertical silhouette",
    "image_2": "optional facade detail and material realism reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "35mm architectural exterior photography to capture more facility context",
    "aperture": "f/8 for deep focus",
    "light_source": "controlled overcast or early morning neutral daylight to emphasize structural forms",
    "time_of_day": "neutral daylight",
    "motion_rule": "static architectural shot"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "dominant facility mass with vertical emphasis",
    "clean industrial details like high-spec ventilation louvers or conduit routing on the exterior",
    "structural steel and glass combination",
    "foreground remains clean and unobtrusive"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium industrial architectural photography, similar to high-end data center or research facility aesthetics",
  "color_restriction": "restrained cool neutrals, slate grey, brushed aluminum, and deep glass blues. Avoid vibrant primary colors.",
  "material_notes": [
    "brushed metal panels",
    "structural glass curtain wall",
    "clean concrete or stone base",
    "precise industrial joints and weatherproofing details"
  ],
  "scene": "A modern engineering or industrial research facility with a disciplined architectural rhythm, featuring high-spec industrial materials and clean exterior technical infrastructure silhouettes.",
  "subject": "The facility architecture itself is the hero, emphasizing precision and scale.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible industrial facade geometry",
    "high-spec ventilation or technical louvers",
    "clean structural steel elements",
    "modern industrial facility character"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "4:5",
    "focal_structure": "vertical facade rhythm with industrial detail accents",
    "camera": "architectural exterior photography, eye-level, realistic perspective"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "clean commercial industrial photography",
    "mood": "precise, established, technical",
    "contrast": "realistic and balanced"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a modern industrial B2B website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "avoid generic downtown office vibes",
    "no embedded text or UI",
    "consistent with the hero image's professional tone"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "generic glass office towers",
    "futuristic cityscapes",
    "sci-fi or cyberpunk aesthetics",
    "crowded streets or pedestrians",
    "embedded headline text",
    "oversaturated blue sky",
    "messy construction sites"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: V3 focus on industrial facility realism and technical details
